creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Hubert Tournier from comment #0)

Committed, thanks for the entries and CC'ing the maintainers! 

Unfortunately, quite time has passed, so I have adjusted the entry dates accordingly to match reality.

I also noticed that exactly one character was missing from the entry with the VID c2c89dea-2859-4231-8f3b-12be0d475ff. I have padded this with a leading zero:

> c2c89dea-2859-4231-8f3b-12be0d475ff -> c2c89dea-2859-4231-8f3b-012be0d475ff
